reviews.review_body:
If you want admission of your child so you should be ex student of the school .

So please give me admission I'll read for 10 years then you give admission to my child.. .

We give admission to siblings ..How you'll give admission to siblings when you are not giving admission to first child.

Such a policy could limit the diversity of the student body by excluding children from different backgrounds, communities, and perspectives.

Depending on local laws and regulations, such a policy could be challenged for discrimination if it is seen as limiting opportunities unfairly based on non-academic criteria.
